name: Dead Weight Remediation
description: Prune verified dead code and assets, then reconcile documentation and governance references surfaced by the repository dead weight audit.
author: Codex

phases.name: Runtime Prune
phases.description: Remove unused components, helpers, and orphaned content outside the production tree.

phases.name: Asset Prune
phases.description: Delete verified orphaned images and public icons after cross-checking local registries and text references.

phases.name: Docs & Governance Reconcile
phases.description: Update active docs and governance references so they match the current CLI, workflow, and test surfaces.

notes: Supersedes the unfinished cleanup intent from 015-dead-weight-audit without altering archived or historical plan state.
